summary: pre-1 check failed: task 162 OptionSome/OptionNone variants absent from codebase. Escalated as esc-163-25. No implementation steps taken.

Added OptionSome/OptionNone variants to CompiledExprKind in reify-types, plus walk/collect/remap arms and constructors. Added stub eval_expr arms and option_eval_tests.rs with step-1 tests. Blocked: reify-compiler/src/lib.rs:collect_body_refs_inner() also matches on CompiledExprKind exhaustively and needs OptionSome/OptionNone arms — outside task scope. Escalated.

All 6 steps complete. Fixed reify-compiler collect_body_refs_inner exhaustive match (OptionSome/OptionNone arms). Implemented OptionNone => Value::Option(None) and OptionSome(inner) => Value::Option(Some(Box::new(eval(inner)))) in eval_expr. 12 tests in option_eval_tests.rs all pass. Full reify-expr suite clean.

Verify current workspace compiles and tests pass on the worktree baseline (cargo check --workspace); Write failing tests for Type::Orientation in ty.rs: variant construction with Orientation(3), Display format 'Orientation3', factory method Type::orientation(n), Eq/Hash consistency, is_numeric() returns false, as_name() returns None; Add Orientation(usize) variant to Type enum, add orientation(n) factory method, add Display arm writing 'Orientation{n}'. Derives (Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash) are automatic.; Write failing tests for Value::Orientation in value.rs: variant construction, PartialEq (same quaternion equal, different not equal, NaN bitwise equality via to_bits), Ord (type_tag ordering, within-type lexicographic on w/x/y/z bits), Display format '[w, x, y, z]q', content_hash (tag=16, NaN canonicalization, distinct from other variants); Add Orientation { w: f64, x: f64, y: f64, z: f64 } variant to Value enum. Add arms to: content_hash (tag=16 with NaN canonicalization for all 4 components), PartialEq (bitwise f64 comparison), Ord (type_tag=15, compare w/x/y/z via to_bits), Display (format as quaternion). Add is_undef/as_f64/dimension pass-through (Orientation is not numeric, dimension is DIMENSIONLESS).; Fix downstream exhaustive matches: add Value::Orientation arm to format_value() in reify-lsp/src/analysis.rs (format as quaternion string), add Value::Orientation arm to domain classifier in reify-constraints/src/classifier.rs (Orientation doesn't contribute to domain classification, same as Complex/Tensor). Add Type::Orientation and Value::Orientation to exports.rs verification test.; Write failing test for orient_identity: no-arg call returns Value::Orientation { w: 1.0, x: 0.0, y: 0.0, z: 0.0 }; call with args returns Undef; Add orient_identity match arm in eval_builtin: check args.is_empty(), return identity quaternion (1,0,0,0)

Completed all remaining 8 steps. orient_quaternion: normalize_quaternion helper + 4-arg extraction. orient_axis_angle: tensor_components_f64 for axis + trig_input for angle + axis-angle formula. orient_euler: elementary_rotation_quat + quat_mul helpers, 12 conventions (6 Tait-Bryan + 6 proper Euler). orient_basis: orthonormality validation + Shepperd's method for rotation-matrix-to-quaternion. 159 stdlib tests pass, workspace compiles clean.

All 19 steps complete. Wrote 34 failing tests covering: complex() constructor (Real/Int/mixed, Scalar with dimensions, error cases: dimension mismatch, NaN/Inf, wrong arg count, non-numeric), re/im accessors (dimensionless→Real, dimensioned→Scalar, non-complex→Undef), conjugate, magnitude extended for Complex, phase (atan2 returning ANGLE Scalar), complex_add with dimension matching, complex_mul with DimensionVector::mul() for dimension combination, and Complex<Impedance> integration test. Implemented all 7 new eval_builtin arms (complex, re, im, conjugate, phase, complex_add, complex_mul) plus extended magnitude. 199 stdlib tests pass, workspace clean.

All 16 steps complete. Value::Matrix (task 229) not found anywhere — escalated esc-230-4 (non-blocking) and implemented using rank-2 Value::Tensor instead. Steps 1-8 (add/sub/mul/div tests+impl): pass immediately via existing recursive Tensor arithmetic. Step 9: neg tests written (failing). Step 10: extracted neg_value() recursive helper, eval_unop Neg now handles rank-2 tensors. Steps 11/13: mat*vec and mat*mat tests written (failing). Steps 12/14: added Matrix*Vector (rank-2×rank-1) and Matrix*Matrix (rank-2×rank-2) arms to eval_mul using matches!(rows[0], Value::Tensor(_)) guard. Step 15: edge case tests (empty matrix, undef propagation, 1x1 degenerate). Step 16: empty-tensor guards in eval_add and eval_sub. 26 new tests pass, 224 total reify-expr tests pass, workspace compiles clean.
No new steps completed

All 15 steps complete. Fixed compilation error: is_geometry_let was updated to take functions param for shadow checking but 5 call sites still passed 1 arg — fixed in compile_entity (3 sites), register_guarded_names (added param + 2 recursive calls + 2 external callers), compile_block_guard (1 site). All implementation was already present: TransformKind::Scale/RotateAround (pre-1), GeometryOp::Scale/RotateAround (pre-2), scale_shape/rotate_around_shape C++ FFI (pre-3/4), is_geometry_function + compile_geometry_call arms (step-1/2/3/4), kernel dispatch + tests (step-5/6/7/8), eval dispatch + tests (step-9/10/11). 35 compiler tests, 147 eval tests pass, workspace compiles clean.

Verify existing tests pass with `cargo test -p reify-test-support` before making changes; Write failing tests for range value constructors in values.rs::tests: (a) range_inclusive_creates_both_bounds_inclusive - range_inclusive(mm(10.0), mm(100.0)) produces Range with lower=Some(mm(10)), upper=Some(mm(100)), lower_inclusive=true, upper_inclusive=true; (b) range_exclusive_creates_both_bounds_exclusive; (c) range_at_least_creates_lower_bound_only with upper=None; (d) range_at_most_creates_upper_bound_only with lower=None; (e) range_half_open_creates_lower_inclusive_upper_exclusive.; Implement range value constructors in values.rs: range_inclusive(lower, upper) -> Value::range(Some(lower), Some(upper), true, true), range_exclusive(lower, upper) -> Value::range(Some(lower), Some(upper), false, false), range_at_least(lower) -> Value::range(Some(lower), None, true, false), range_at_most(upper) -> Value::range(None, Some(upper), false, true), range_half_open(lower, upper) -> Value::range(Some(lower), Some(upper), true, false). All delegate to Value::range() for flag normalization.; Write failing tests for temperature value constructors in values.rs::tests: (a) kelvin_creates_temperature_scalar - kelvin(300.0) produces Scalar { si_value: 300.0, dimension: TEMPERATURE }; (b) celsius_converts_to_kelvin - celsius(0.0) produces si_value=273.15, celsius(100.0) produces si_value=373.15; (c) fahrenheit_converts_to_kelvin - fahrenheit(32.0) produces si_value=273.15 (freezing), fahrenheit(212.0) produces si_value=373.15 (boiling).; Implement temperature value constructors in values.rs: kelvin(v: f64) -> Value::Scalar { si_value: v, dimension: DimensionVector::TEMPERATURE }, celsius(v: f64) -> kelvin(v + 273.15), fahrenheit(v: f64) -> kelvin((v - 32.0) * 5.0 / 9.0 + 273.15). Add DimensionVector::TEMPERATURE to the use imports.; Write failing tests for option expression helpers in builders.rs::tests: (a) option_some_expr_wraps_inner_with_option_type - option_some_expr(literal(Value::Int(42))) produces CompiledExprKind::OptionSome with result_type=Type::Option(Box::new(Type::Int)); (b) option_none_expr_produces_option_none_kind - option_none_expr(Type::Real) produces CompiledExprKind::OptionNone with result_type=Type::Option(Box::new(Type::Real)); (c) option_some_expr_content_hash_is_nonzero.; Implement option expression helpers in builders.rs: pub fn option_some_expr(inner: CompiledExpr) -> CompiledExpr that computes result_type = Type::Option(Box::new(inner.result_type.clone())) then delegates to CompiledExpr::option_some(inner, result_type); pub fn option_none_expr(inner_type: Type) -> CompiledExpr that computes result_type = Type::Option(Box::new(inner_type)) then delegates to CompiledExpr::option_none(result_type). Place near the other collection expression helpers (after map_expr).; Write failing tests for free_param and param_no_default on TopologyTemplateBuilder in builders.rs::tests: (a) free_param_creates_auto_kind_cell - free_param('S', 'x', Type::length()) produces ValueCellDecl with kind=Auto, no default, public visibility; (b) free_param_is_equivalent_to_auto_param - same output as auto_param; (c) param_no_default_creates_param_kind_without_default - param_no_default('S', 'y', Type::Int) produces kind=Param, no default_expr, public visibility.; Implement free_param and param_no_default on TopologyTemplateBuilder. free_param(entity, member, cell_type) is a semantic alias calling auto_param internally: pushes ValueCellDecl with ValueCellKind::Auto. param_no_default(entity, member, cell_type) pushes ValueCellDecl with ValueCellKind::Param, default_expr: None, public visibility. Both follow the existing mut self -> Self pattern.

All 12 steps complete. Fixed duplicate HashMap import in values.rs. TypeAliasMap builder (new/alias/build) and common_type_aliases() (Pressure/Velocity/Acceleration) in values.rs. type_alias_module() fixture (HeatExchanger with TEMPERATURE free param, PRESSURE default, VELOCITY default) in fixtures.rs. Integration test composing free_param, celsius() default, range_inclusive constraint, option_some_expr/option_none_expr conditional, param_no_default. All 117 reify-test-support tests pass, no warnings.

Add `annotation` grammar rule to grammar.js: `seq('@', field('name', alias($.immediate_identifier, $.identifier)), optional(seq('(', commaSep($._expression), ')')))`. Add `$.annotation` to `_declaration` choice. Regenerate parser with `tree-sitter generate` in tree-sitter-reify/.; Add `Annotation` struct to lib.rs: `pub struct Annotation { pub name: String, pub args: Vec<Expr>, pub span: SourceSpan }`. Add `pub annotations: Vec<Annotation>` field to all 10 declaration types (StructureDef, OccurrenceDef, ImportDecl, EnumDecl, FnDef, TraitDecl, FieldDef, PurposeDef, ConstraintDef, UnitDecl).; Add `annotations: vec![]` to all struct literals in ts_parser.rs lowering functions (lower_structure, lower_occurrence, lower_import, lower_enum, lower_function, lower_trait, lower_field, lower_purpose, lower_constraint_def, lower_unit) and any downstream code constructing these types. Verify all existing tests still pass — this is a no-op change.

All 22 steps complete. Steps 1-4 were already committed by the previous iteration (b893c227, 36f63990) but plan.json wasn't updated — fixed. Steps 5-22 added as TDD test/impl pairs. The implementation (lower_annotation + pending_annotations pattern from step-2) already handled all cases via lower_expr(): identifier args, complex expression args, multiple args, multiple annotations, all 9 remaining declaration types, empty arg list, pragma interop, trailing orphan annotation, and annotation-between-declarations reset. All 20 annotation tests pass, full reify-syntax suite clean.

All 12 steps complete. Steps 1-11 were already committed in prior session (3e77f297 through 1ae7ac54). Step-12 regression check: cargo test --package reify-compiler passes with 24 trait_conformance tests + all existing tests. ConformanceError enum (MissingParam, TypeMismatch, MissingLet) and check_trait_conformance() public pure function fully implemented and tested.

All 13 items complete (1 prerequisite + 12 steps). Pre-1: verified task-157 chained comparison desugaring (9 tests pass). Steps 1-12: wrote crates/reify-eval/tests/chained_comparison_eval.rs with 12 E2E eval tests. Tests cover: range satisfied/violated-below/violated-above (steps 1-3), boundary strict-lt exclusion at lower/upper (steps 4-5), 3-element chain all-satisfied/middle-violated (steps 6-7), mixed operators le<=lt boundary/violated (steps 8-9), Undef propagation via auto param (step-10), dimensional mismatch LENGTH vs MASS → Undef (step-11), compiled IR structure inspection (step-12). All 12 tests pass immediately against the existing task-157 implementation. `kg` is a built-in unit in unit_to_scalar; `param x : Int = auto` creates ValueCellKind::Auto which evaluates to Value::Undef in the engine.

All 8 steps complete. Added 10 new Value::Vector-specific tests for all four linalg builtins. All tests pass immediately without implementation changes — the existing tensor_components_f64 already handles Value::Vector, and the wrapper-preservation logic (cross/normalize return Value::Vector when both inputs are Vector) was already coded. 244 total stdlib tests pass.

All 14 steps complete in a single iteration. Added 21 new tests to tensor_matrix_arithmetic_tests.rs covering: rank-1 tensor add/sub/neg/div with dimension tracking (steps 1-6), rank/shape validation including rank-1+rank-2=Undef, empty tensor=Undef, rank-1*rank-1=Undef (steps 7-8), rank-3 tensor addition verifying recursive componentwise_op generality (steps 9-10), mat*vec and mat*mat Angle*Length dimension product Q1*Q2 (steps 11-12), integration test scalar*(M+M)*v with dimension chain (steps 13-14). All 55 tests pass immediately — existing recursive implementation in eval_add/eval_sub/eval_mul/eval_div/neg_value handles all ranks generically via componentwise_op without any changes.

All 10 steps complete. Wrote crates/reify-eval/tests/m8_stdlib_integration.rs with eval_ri_file() helper + 14 tests across 2 fixtures. Created examples/math_linalg.ri (MathLinalg structure: n_unit=1kg*1m/(1s*1s), zero helpers, vec3/dot/cross/magnitude/normalize/acos/clamp/lerp). Created examples/dimensional_consistency.ri (DimensionalConsistency structure: lerp/dot/cross/gravity/mod/normalize/magnitude/clamp dimension checks). All 14 tests pass on first run — no fixes needed. Key findings: let-to-let references work via topological sort; 1kg*1m/(1s*1s) builds FORCE dimension; normalize() always returns Value::Real (dimensionless) regardless of input.

All 12 items complete (1 prerequisite + 11 steps). pre-1: added resolve_type_expr() helper that handles Option<T> recursively, updated param type resolution call site to use it. step-1: 6 parser tests for some()/none syntax (all pass immediately via existing grammar). steps-2/4/6/8/10: 8 failing compiler tests covering some() arity errors, some(42)→OptionSome, none→OptionNone, param Option<Int>=none, nested some, param ref in some, no-context none. steps-3/5: intercepted some() in FunctionCall arm and none in Ident arm before normal resolution. step-7: none type context propagation at param compilation site (re-types OptionNone to match param's Option<T> annotation). steps-9/11: all edge cases already handled by implementation. 8 option_compile_tests + 6 option_tests all pass. Full reify-compiler + reify-syntax suites clean.

All 18 steps complete. Added check_trait_conformance_chain() (single-entry) and check_trait_conformance_multi() (multi-entry with shared visited state) to reify-compiler/src/lib.rs. Internal collect_chain_requirements() does depth-first, parent-first refinement walking with diamond dedup. Added ConflictingRequirement { name, type_a, type_b } and UnresolvedTrait { name } variants to ConformanceError enum. 9 new tests in trait_conformance_tests.rs: chain_single_trait_no_refinement, chain_two_level_walks_parent, chain_three_level_all_satisfied, chain_missing_deep_ancestor_member, chain_diamond_dedup_satisfied, chain_diamond_missing_exactly_one_error, chain_conflicting_requirements, chain_unresolved_trait, integration_deep_chain_defaults_no_duplicate_injection. Full reify-compiler suite (50 trait conformance tests) passes clean.
